base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_intro_map_variants — a ui (cutscene) from 1987 contra. 8 stage-intro map variants (one per stage) — each shows briefing + target location. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 8 stage-intro map variants (one per stage) — each shows briefing + target location
